cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: Sydney is known for its Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, and stunning beaches.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: Melbourne is famous for its coffee culture, arts scene, and sports stadiums.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: Tokyo offers a mix of ultramodern and traditional, from neon-lit skyscrapers to historic temples.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Kyoto is the heart of traditional Japan, famous for its numerous classical Buddhist temples.

cities.name: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
cities.description: Rio is famous for its Carnival, Christ the Redeemer, and vibrant beaches like Copacabana.

cities.name: Sao Paulo, Brazil
cities.description: Sao Paulo is a massive metropolis known for its architecture, gastronomy, and culture.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: Angkor Wat is a massive temple complex in Cambodia and the largest religious monument in the world.

temples.name: Taj Mahal, India
temples.description: An ivory-white marble mausoleum on the right bank of the river Yamuna in Agra, India.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: Bora Bora is a small South Pacific island northwest of Tahiti in French Polynesia, known for its turquoise lagoons.

beaches.name: Copacabana, Brazil
beaches.description: Copacabana is a vibrant neighborhood in Rio de Janeiro, known for its 4km crescent-shaped beach.
